title: 'Trump, Shut Up': Iran Trolls Ceasefire Extension With AI Video | WATCH
description: Iranians have created another AI-generated video mocking Donald Trump. Meanwhile, the actual status of the ceasefire remains uncertain.

title: Elon Musk plans to use Intel’s 14A for Terafab AI chips
description: Tesla will utilize Intel's upcoming 14A chip manufacturing process for its ambitious Terafab AI chip complex in Austin, as confirmed by CEO Elon Musk. This partnership marks a significant external customer win for Intel's contract manufacturing business. Musk highlighted the need for the Terafab to meet anticipated demand for AI and autonomous driving technologies.

title: Anthropic seeks to debunk Pentagon's claims about its control over AI technology in military systems
description: Anthropic on Wednesday told an appeals court that it can’t manipulate its artificial intelligence tool Claude once it is deployed in classified Pentagon military networks

title: Apple reshapes AI strategy by doubling down on Siri and privacy
description: As OpenAI and xAI pivot toward enterprise markets inspired by Anthropic, and as OpenClaw sparks new visions for agent-based AI, Apple has finally set a clear AI focus for its 2026 Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC). The company announced the event will focus on AI advancements and new software and developer tools, marking Apple's most direct AI statement in recent years.
